title: The First Signal
hint: A fragmented transmission recorded 72 hours before the event.
description: A corrupted radio log recovered from a buried relay station. Someone was warned — and chose silence.

title: The Eastern Seam
hint: An old miner's note about deposits that 'shouldn't exist'.
description: A handwritten map fragment pointing to a mineral-rich seam buried beneath the Eastern Wastes — untouched because nobody else knows it's there.

title: The Green Corridor
hint: A migration path used by those who made it out.
description: A route used by a small group who survived the last catastrophe. Radiation levels are measurably lower. Movement speed along this corridor is increased.

title: Cold Extraction
hint: A method that extracts ore without heat — and without detection.
description: A pre-catastrophe industrial technique that dramatically reduces energy cost for ore extraction. The faction that developed it called it 'cold ghost mining'.

title: The Architect's Confession
hint: Someone built the machine that ended everything — and wrote it down.
description: A sealed letter found in a lead-lined vault. The author describes — in clinical detail — the device constructed to 'reset civilisational imbalance'. They believed it was mercy.

title: The Hexagonal Principle
hint: Structures built on this pattern are still standing.
description: Ancient architectural mathematics based on hexagonal load distribution. Buildings constructed using this principle resist structural failure from seismic and atmospheric events.

title: Subsurface Cache Network
hint: They buried supplies in places that couldn't burn.
description: A network of underground caches established by a pre-catastrophe survivalist group. Each cache is geo-referenced and stocked with long-duration supplies.

title: Geomantic Anchor
hint: Buildings tied to ley lines survived what nothing else did.
description: A complete blueprint for a geomantic foundation system that anchors structures to sub-surface energy lines. Near-total catastrophe resistance. Used by the old orders — whose buildings still stand.

title: The Third Seal
hint: A symbol those who held real power would recognise.
description: The rank insignia and pass-phrase of the Third Circle of the old Order — a pre-catastrophe shadow government. Presenting this to certain NPCs unlocks faction quests and elevated trust.

title: The Complete Record
hint: One person documented everything. They did not survive.
description: A full account of the events leading to the catastrophe — names, dates, decisions, and the final moment. This is the truth the world was never meant to know. Changes the ending of the current cycle.
